text:
A few characters in Hunter × Hunter are shown to use animals as a form of weaponry. This could be due to the fact that they are Manipulators or simply because they have tamed the animals. Some of these animals are:

 
2011 EP18 Ponzu's bees.png
HxH2011 EP3 Bourbon Portrait.png
Squala_And_His_Dogs.png
Flutter_Satellitonbo.png
Cluck_Manipulating_Birds_Volume_30_Colored.png
Leech_Tongue_2011.png
Roach.png
 

Bees: Ponzu carries bees underneath her big round hat. They emerge and attack her enemies when threatened. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 4, Chapter 31 This skill improved a lot after Ponzu learned Nen, as she was capable of using them as message carriers. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 190 

Snakes: Used by the snake charmer Bourbon, these snakes attack anyone Bourbon orders them to. He can also have them hide and attack when the enemy gets close to their master. 

Dogs: Manipulated by Squala's ability. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 12, Chapter 112 

Dragonflies: Flutter conjures them as satellite through his ability Super Eye. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 23, Chapter 237 

Birds: Similar to Squala's ability, Cluck's ability is to control an undetermined number of birds. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 30, Chapter 320 

Leeches: Used by the Shadow Beast Leech, who keeps them in his body. They can be used for medical purposes as well as a deadly weapon. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 76 

Small creatures (especially insects): Sayird emits an aura ball at a small living being (no bigger than a hamster) and he can manipulate it, seeing and hearing through the animal. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 361 Kurapika's Steal Chain Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 364 and Stealth Dolphin allowed Sayird's Nen ability (Little Eye) to be also used by Queen Oito once to control a cockroach. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 367 Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 368 Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 369
